candidates.why: Best top-line revenue line; equals Total Revenue across shown years and is more specific than a total label.
Revenue-related wording but appears empty and not the main top-line.
Clear revenue total; useful as fallback if label changes over time.
This is COGS, not revenue.
Operating expense, not revenue.

variables.notes: Using a priority list for possible label variation; prefer Operating revenue over Total Revenue because the latter is a subtotal/total.

candidates.why: Direct and most standard COGS label.
Also a valid COGS label; same values in preview, so useful as fallback if reporting label changes.
Inventory asset, not income statement COGS.

candidates.row_label: Cost of goods sold - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing row, should not be used when explicit COGS exists.

candidates.row_label: Other Total cost of goods and services sold
candidates.why: Contains Total/other wording and appears to be a subcomponent/balancing-related line, not preferred over explicit COGS.

candidates.row_label: Impairment included in Cost of goods sold
candidates.why: Impairment component only, not total COGS.

variables.notes: Priority list for COGS label changes; explicit COGS labels selected, excluding balancing and impairment rows.

candidates.why: Explicit SG&A row and populated; per rules should select only this row when present.
Also SG&A-like, but appears to be a component/sub-line versus the broader explicit SG&A row.
Possible overhead bucket, but not needed because explicit SG&A exists and is populated.
Can be an SG&A component, but should not be added when explicit SG&A line exists and is populated.
Headcount metric, not expense.

variables.notes: Explicit SG&A row exists and is populated, so select only that row per hierarchy rule (a). Excluded component and supplemental rows to avoid double counting.

candidates.why: Direct R&D expense label; best match.
R&D-related D&A component, but XRD should use the main R&D expense line, not a component.

candidates.row_label: Impairment related to Research and Development Costs
candidates.why: Impairment component, not main recurring R&D expense.
Balance sheet asset, not period expense.
Balance sheet gross asset, not expense.
Balance sheet accumulated amortization, not R&D expense.
Balance sheet net asset, not expense.
Balance sheet label with no evidence of expense use here.
Balance sheet accumulated amortization, not period expense.

variables.notes: Main income statement R&D expense line selected. Duplicate occurrence of the same label in preview reinforces label continuity; final_choice keeps the label only once.

candidates.why: Broader finance expense line; appropriate fallback if explicit interest expense unavailable.
Explicit interest expense line; best match.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Specific lease-interest component only, not total interest expense.
Partial interest component, not preferred over main interest line.
Explicit interest expense label, though empty in preview; valid fallback for label variation.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental lease-interest component, not total interest expense.
Balance sheet accrual, not income statement expense.

variables.notes: Priority list: prefer explicit interest expense lines first, with broader Financial expenses as final fallback if explicit interest label is missing in some years.

candidates.why: Income statement earnings line, not book equity.

candidates.row_label: Remeasurement of equity instruments (net of tax)
candidates.why: OCI component, not book equity.
Reserve/OCI component, not total equity attributable to owners.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to the owners of the parent company
candidates.why: Best BE choice because it excludes non-controlling interests, avoiding double count with MIB.
Total equity includes NCI; use only if owner equity unavailable.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to the owners of the parent company

variables.notes: Preferred owner-attributable equity selected to exclude non-controlling interests and avoid double counting with MIB.

candidates.why: Income statement attribution line, not balance sheet minority interest stock.
Direct balance sheet NCI line; best match.
Equivalent balance sheet label; useful fallback if label varies over time.
Income statement attribution line, not preferred for balance sheet MIB.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Comprehensive income attribution, not balance sheet minority interest.

variables.notes: Priority list for balance sheet minority interest / non-controlling interest label changes.
